sourceMovie.title: Armageddon
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Armageddon works as a action movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The action and thriller blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: The Matrix Revolutions
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Armageddon clicked for you, The Matrix Revolutions (2003) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and thriller, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Armageddon?
faq.answer: Try The Matrix Revolutions, Star Trek II: The Wrath of Khan, Star Trek: Generations—each shares DNA with Armageddon while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Armageddon?
faq.answer: Armageddon (1998) is best described as Action, Thriller, Science Fiction, Adventure. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Armageddon worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.8/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this action lane.
